linting.notes: Linting is enforced in CI with -D warnings flag on clippy, treating all warnings as errors. Format checking requires exact rustfmt compliance.

testing.mock_patterns: Tests use inline test data structures for GatewayConfig validation
testing.notes: Tests are located in src/config.rs in a #[cfg(test)] module. Current codebase has 4 tests, but one test (test_validate_multiple_same_server_output_detectors) fails due to a bug in the validation logic.

ci.notes: CI runs on pull_request and push to main/incubation/stable branches. Uses Rust 1.84.0 with rustfmt and clippy components. Caching is configured for cargo registry and build artifacts.

build.install_command: cargo build (dependencies auto-installed) or cargo fetch
build.notes: Rust toolchain 1.84.0 is pinned in rust-toolchain.toml. Components rustfmt and clippy are required. The project builds a single binary named vllm-orchestrator-gateway.

conventions.test_file_pattern: Tests are inline in source files within #[cfg(test)] modules
conventions.test_naming: Test functions use #[test] attribute, named with test_ prefix, some with #[should_panic] attribute
conventions.import_style: Standard Rust module imports, using 'use' statements with :: separators
conventions.notes: Follows standard Rust conventions. Test functions marked with #[test] attribute. Panic tests marked with #[should_panic].

lint_commands.notes: Exit code 1: found formatting issues in src/config.rs and src/main.rs. Command works correctly - formatting violations detected.
Exit code 101: found 4 clippy warnings treated as errors due to -D warnings flag. Issues: expect_fun_call, needless_return, len_zero, manual_strip. Command works correctly.

test_commands.notes: Exit code 101: 3 tests passed, 1 test failed. Test 'test_validate_multiple_same_server_output_detectors' expected to panic but didn't - this is a legitimate bug in the code, not a test infrastructure problem.

container_recipe.notes: Base rust:1.84.0 image includes rustup with toolchain auto-configured from rust-toolchain.toml. Rustfmt and clippy components are automatically installed on first use. No special system dependencies required for basic build/test.
